case_title: MARJORIE MAMARIL RIMANDO VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIMANDO, MARJORIE MAMARIL AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIMANDO, MARJORIE MAMARIL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-08-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.
